# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading LegacyWebForms from ASP.NET WebForms (net472) to ASP.NET Core Razor Pages (net10.0). The project uses a legacy project format and requires SDK-style conversion followed by a full framework migration. Strategy: All-at-Once.

**Progress**: 4/4 tasks complete <progress value="100" max="100"></progress> 100%

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-prerequisites: Verify upgrade prerequisites ([Content](tasks/01-prerequisites/task.md), [Progress](tasks/01-prerequisites/progress-details.md))
- ✅ 02-sdk-conversion: Convert project to SDK-style format ([Content](tasks/02-sdk-conversion/task.md), [Progress](tasks/02-sdk-conversion/progress-details.md))
- ✅ 03-aspnetcore-migration: Migrate to ASP.NET Core Razor Pages on .NET 10 ([Content](tasks/03-aspnetcore-migration/task.md), [Progress](tasks/03-aspnetcore-migration/progress-details.md))
- ✅ 04-final-validation: Final build and validation ([Content](tasks/04-final-validation/task.md), [Progress](tasks/04-final-validation/progress-details.md))
